author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Result: Added broadcast_div_f32 GPU kernel mirroring the existing broadcast_add/sub/mul pattern. Four files changed: (1) gpu_dispatch.rs — added broadcast_div_f32 to GpuBackend trait, (2) kernels.rs — added BROADCAST_DIV_PTX constant and gpu_broadcast_div() function with PTX kernel launch + CPU fallback, (3) backend_impl.rs — implemented broadcast_div_f32 for CudaBackendImpl, (4) arithmetic.rs — replaced binary_map fallback with broadcast_div_f32 call and added missing DeviceMismatch guard. cargo check clean, 214/219 tests pass (5 pre-existing vision model gradient failures unrelated to this change).
